MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEILA NARVID OF PAYNE & FEARS APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS HEATHER GRAY AND KIM LANE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF ANSWER OF CROSS-DEFENDANTS 360 SF, LLC, KATHERINE YEE AND JENNIFER BURTON SILVER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OF HEATHER GRAY AND KIM LANE is denied. The answer is deemed to allege entitlement to fees under Labor Code 218.5 and on no other basis. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEILA NARVID OF PAYNE & FEARS APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants KIM LANE AND HEATHER GRAY'S demurrer to answer of Cross-Defendants Agency 360 SF, LLC, Katherine Yee and Jennifer Silver to cross complaint of Heather Gray and Kim Lane is overruled. Any further information desired by defendants can be obtained through discovery. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)
